title: The MACU Report — Episode 12 — Tale of the Tape
notes: WEEK 2 (Tue) — Road to the Crater Bowl, Day 2. Fresh reset: NO Unit 7 / moon / Signal. CONTINUITY: the moon RETURNED end of ep10 and is normal — never written as missing. Interwoven: MEET THE GLOWBOYS (scout the glowing Glow Plant opponent; NORM=Howie returns) + SAVE THE LAST SLAG (Ron benches the lone survivor; clashes with Coach Bodhi=Snoop; the Slag walks home 'during the weather'). Wider-MACU bit: PHOENIX APOTHECARY (FERN=Laura). ONE ignored AI beat (Glow Plant dark-energy reactor = war-bot tech) — long fuse to ~ep15. Gary (Newman, intercom-only) escalates: found Walter's car, named it Brenda. NO new clones — all profiles exist. NO hold cues. v2 script (writers'-room punch-up). NEW GRAPHIC: tale_of_the_tape matchup card. REUSE ep11: the_crater_bowl + scoreboard comp (new 'scoreboard_odds' state: GLOWBOYS -60 / O-U SURVIVING SLAGS 0.5). OmniVoice /generate = multipart -F.

comfyui.note: zeroscope_v2_576w (watermark-free). 384x384x24f locked - do not bump resolution.

style.suffix: , black and white, grainy vintage analog television footage, 1970s broadcast, retro futurism, low resolution, washed out, soft focus
style.negative: shutterstock, watermark, text, caption, logo, color, colour, modern, smartphone, digital screen, hd, 4k, sharp, blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, mutated, extra limbs, extra fingers

render_rule: For each shot: full_prompt = prompt_core + style.suffix; negative = style.negative; seed = shot.seed. Cold-start fire-and-poll. For each cue with non-empty vo: POST the line (multipart form-data -F, NOT JSON) to the speaker_map voice -> vo/<cue_id>.wav. No hold cues this episode. Per-shot screen time = cue duration / number of shots. Apply jank filtergraph, RIFE 3x, concat, mux VO, mix music beds, mix sfx one-shots, burn subs -> final/ep12.mp4.

title_assets.the_crater_bowl: REUSE — copy episodes/ep11/titles/the_crater_bowl.mp4 here (or auto-resolves from shared assets/titles)
title_assets.tale_of_the_tape: episodes/ep12/titles/tale_of_the_tape.mp4 (NEW — Hyperframes comp 'macu-tale-of-the-tape-card'; SLAGS 1 vs GLOWBOYS 40 matchup. Max: render + copy here)
title_assets.scoreboard_odds: episodes/ep12/titles/scoreboard_odds.mp4 (NEW state of ep11 comp 'crater-bowl-scoreboard-card': GLOWBOYS -60 / O-U SURVIVING SLAGS 0.5)
title_assets.macu_weather: REUSE — copy episodes/ep11/titles/macu_weather.mp4 (ep7 weather_card) here, or auto-resolves from shared assets/titles

beds.name: scout
beds.note: Big-band bed under the Glowboys scouting segment. Loop to cover.

music.note: Intro + a bed under the scout segment + outro. Rest plays dry.

sfx.note: One-shots mixed at each cue's start (VO stays full). SYNTH (Max, ffmpeg into assets/sfx/): intercom_crackle.wav (Gary's intercom signature — reused from ep11), reactor_hum.wav (low ominous hum under the reactor reveal). Missing file -> skip gracefully.

subtitles.note: Do NOT put FontName=/Fontsize= in force_style; stage 8 prepends its own from font/fontsize.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Good evening, MACU. It's Tuesday. Three days to the Crater Bowl, and the Sector Nine Slags remain undefeated in spirit.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: They remain undefeated in spirit because they have one player. A roster of one.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: One is a roster, Walter. One is a movement.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: Walter, it's Gary. From the weekend. Good news — I found your car. The blue one, out back. I'm keepin' it warm for ya. Don't you worry about the window.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: That is my car, Gary. To the field.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Tonight we scout the opposition. We go live to Crater Carl, at the Glow Plant.

cues.speaker: CRATER CARL
cues.vo: Thanks, Walter! I'm here with the Glowboys — forty men, and folks, every single one of them glows. You don't need stadium lights. You ARE the lights.

cues.speaker: NORM
cues.vo: Norm Glubb, Glow Plant. Our boys are powered direct from the reactor — free performance enhancement, courtesy of the Plant. They don't tire. They don't blink. And legally? Still people. Mostly.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Forty glowing ringers. My guy has heart. Wait. That's a dark-energy core. Walter, that's the reactor they put in the war bots. That's the same machine. It's the same—

cues.speaker: NORM
cues.vo: Oh, the core? Same series as the old Mark Four war units, yeah! Ours just play football. Friendlier!

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: The day somebody calls those things just another team and moves on — that's the day we've already lost, MACU. I want that on the record.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: And they're favored by forty. Thank you, Norm — and thank you to the manic fellow beside him, whoever he was. Lovely glow.

cues.speaker: FERN
cues.vo: Welcome to Phoenix Apothecary. Amidst the ashes, we've cultivated nature's gifts — remedies for this unforgiving era. With Phoenix, a mere weed becomes a lifeline.

cues.speaker: FERN
cues.vo: Embrace nature's resilience. Find us today for a free, no-obligation consultation on your journey to wellness. Eight six seven, five three oh nine. Ask for Fern. Tell her the ash sent you. That's the Phoenix Promise.

cues.speaker: FERN
cues.vo: Phoenix Apothecary is not responsible for outcomes consistent with being in the wasteland.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Phoenix Apothecary. Quick question — can you regrow a man? ...Half a man? I have a tooth, a dream, and three days.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: We're back. The Slags' situation has, in the past ninety seconds, deteriorated.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Forty glowing machines, Walter. And one of him. I'm not risking it. Get my last Slag in here — now.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Ron has pulled the Slags' only surviving player off the field, three days before the game.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Son, you're the last one. The whole season's riding on you, which is exactly why I'm benching you. For your safety. You're too important to play.

cues.speaker: THE LAST SLAG
cues.vo: ...I'd like to go home.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: See? He's got plans. He's got a home. We protect this man.

cues.speaker: COACH BODHI
cues.vo: You can't bench him, Ron. Benching him is the cruelty. The crater is patient. Letting him play — letting him relocate — that's the kindest thing a man can do for his energy.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: I will not let you compost my last guy!

cues.speaker: THE LAST SLAG
cues.vo: Coach says I'm already gone. I don't... I don't argue with Coach. ...Crater's nice this time of year, though. Maybe I'll just walk it.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: He seems at peace, Ron.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Coach Bodhi has coached eleven seasons. He has never lost a player to injury.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: The updated Crater Bowl line: the Glowboys, now sixty-point favorites — the line jumped when the Slags listed their only starter as questionable, personal reasons. The over-under on surviving Slags is down to one half.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: Put my house on the Slags. Again.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: ...He will. Ron, it is Tuesday.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: And I'll do it again Wednesday. I told you. That's consistency.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: Ron, it's Gary. Hey — I named the car. Her name's Brenda now. We've been talkin'. We're real happy out here. She says hi.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Weather.

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: Friday's forecast for the Big Hole: ashfall, a chance of structural collapse, a forty percent chance of glow, conditions: mild — and a barometric reading the instruments have politely declined to confirm.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: That's our broadcast, MACU. Two days out. One Slag — alive, benched, and safe, whatever the Coach says—

cues.speaker: WALTER
cues.vo: He went home, Ron. He left during the weather.

cues.speaker: RON
cues.vo: ...Free. He left free, on his own two legs. That's the heart, MACU — and the heart is out there walking. We hold the line.

cues.speaker: GARY
cues.vo: ...Goodnight, Brenda. ...Goodnight, fellas. We'll be right here.
